hero.title: Stop welding names one by one.
hero.subtitle: Generate Cricut-ready SVGs for your entire order — instantly.
hero.text: Making custom shirts for family reunions, bridal parties, or birthdays? Typing each name, adjusting spacing, and welding them in Design Space is a major bottleneck. We are building a new SVG generator to automate this across multiple cut designs.
hero.text2: Try the SVG generator demo below:
hero.text3: This generator will integrate with NamePreview. Soon, you'll be able to let your clients preview their names in different fonts, and instantly download the welded, cut-ready SVGs for production.
